navbar.logo_alt: GeoTapp - The platform that makes work verifiable

risorseHub.metaDesc: Free tools and resources from GeoTapp: the guide to GPS worker monitoring across Europe, the ROI calculator and the proof-of-work survey.
risorseHub.intro:
Free tools, guides and data to make field work provable.
We keep them updated and add new ones.

gps.title: GPS monitoring of workers in the EU
gps.desc: Country by country: what it takes to make GPS and worker monitoring compliant, with checklist, procedure, contacts and a template to download.

roi.title: ROI calculator
roi.desc: Estimate how much time and money you get back by using GeoTapp on your field operations.

survey.title: Survey: proof of work
survey.desc: Two minutes, anonymous: do you trust someone's word, or do you need proof? Help us understand a real problem.

sanzioni.title: GPS penalty calculator
sanzioni.desc: Pick a country and find out how much you risk monitoring workers: real maximum fine and the obligations that expose you.

indice.title: Worker surveillance index in Europe
indice.desc: The ranking of 39 European countries by how strict their worker-monitoring framework is.

generatore.title: GPS notice generator
generatore.desc: Create your customised GPS privacy notice with your logo, GDPR-compliant. Free, in your browser.

dossier.title: Compliance dossier
dossier.desc: What GeoTapp does and does not do, with GDPR, worker-monitoring law and the limits stated plainly.

items.q: Are the resources free?
items.a: Yes, all of them. The maps, the calculators, the privacy-notice generator and the country dossiers are free to use. They're how we share what we've studied about monitoring workers, even if you never become a customer.

items.q: Do I have to sign up or leave my email to use them?
items.a: No. You open the tool and use it. The privacy-notice generator runs inside your browser and sends your data nowhere; the other tools don't ask for an account. If you want to stay updated you can leave us your email, but that's your call, not a toll.

items.q: Can I trust the legal information here?
items.a: It's built on national law and real decisions by the authorities, with the source given and a verification date. That said, it stays an informative resource, not legal advice: before switching a monitoring system on, have your situation checked by a professional.

items.q: Can I use these tools on my own site?
items.a: Yes. The GPS workers map can be embedded with the code on its page, and the resources can be cited by linking the source. If you run an industry blog or advise companies, they're meant for that too.

items.q: Are they only useful if I use GeoTapp?
items.a: No, they stand on their own. We built them so that anyone sending people into the field understands what compliance takes, GeoTapp or not. If you then want a system already set up to record location only at clock-in and not continuously, it's here, but the resources are useful either way.

items.q: Who are they for?
items.a: For anyone with teams working off-site: cleaning firms, installers, security, maintenance, construction. Anyone who has to prove where and when a job was done, and wants to do it without turning employees into dots on a map all day.

footer.tagline: Field activity recorded. Operations organised. Reports verifiable.
footer.newsletter_desc: No spam, just valuable updates on operations management, HR and technology for SMEs.

landing.us_badge: 🇺🇸 Serving US teams, chat support 9am–6pm ET. USD invoicing available on request.
landing.hero_badge: The work happened. Now make it provable.

clockin_demo.caption: One clock-in. GPS, photo and time, sealed. You can't redo it, you can't argue with it.

landing.hero_title: If you can't prove it, the client says it never happened.
landing.hero_subtitle: GeoTapp turns every field job into objective evidence: sealed reports with real GPS data, timestamped photo proof and documentation anyone can verify, without trusting you, without disputes.
landing.trust_gps_desc: Every job certified with location and timestamp
landing.features_subtitle: Three integrated tools: the field records, the office controls, the client verifies.
landing.cta_title: The work happened. Now prove it.
landing.cta_subtitle: Companies using GeoTapp no longer lose undocumented jobs. Every hour is verifiable. Every report is defensible.
landing.problem_subtitle: It's not an organisation problem. It's a proof problem.

problem_items.title: The client denies it. You have no proof.
problem_items.desc: The job happened. But without verifiable documentation, it's your word against theirs. And often they win.

problem_items.title: Reports arrive incomplete, late or not at all.
problem_items.desc: Paper forms, WhatsApp, email. Data gets lost, altered, forgotten. Reconstructing it afterwards is costly and unreliable.

problem_items.title: Undocumented work is unbillable work.
problem_items.desc: Every undocumented hour is an unpaid hour. Every job without proof is a job the client can dispute.

landing.report_section_title: The report. Not a summary. A proof.
landing.report_section_subtitle: Every GeoTapp report is generated automatically from real field data.
landing.report_section_body: GPS clock-ins, timestamped photos, operational notes. The system applies a cryptographic seal that makes any modification detectable. The result is not a document to send to the client. It's proof the client can verify independently.
landing.report_feature_1: Tamper-proof after generation, any modification is detectable
landing.report_feature_2: Verifiable without an account, by anyone, independently
landing.report_feature_3: GPS and photo data integrated and inseparable
landing.report_cta: See how your client verifies it independently

roi_mini.title: What does it cost you to not be able to prove it?
roi_mini.subtitle: Three numbers, one honest estimate. Two seconds, no email.
roi_mini.disclaimer: Conservative estimate (disputes + coordination). The full breakdown, line by line, is in the report.
roi_mini.email_label: Want the detailed report and a benchmark for your sector?
roi_mini.email_cta: Send me the report + start the trial
roi_mini.email_ok: Done. Check your inbox in a moment.
roi_mini.pitch_title: The numbers you don't look at are the ones costing you.
roi_mini.pitch_body: The hours lost to paperwork, the disputes you end up paying for, the coordination done by word of mouth. You don't feel them leaving the books, but they do. Drop in three numbers and see what it adds up to in a year: it usually surprises you, and not for the better.
pitch_points: Every unpaid dispute weighs on you, twelve months out of twelve
Hours spent in the office are hours you don't bill
Two seconds and no email to see the number

flow.title: The office sees everything. In real time.
flow.subtitle:
Flow is the operational hub: jobs, tasks, progress and structured reports. The field works. The office knows.

Your company is a living organism. Every job, every task, every worker is a heartbeat. GeoTapp Flow keeps them all in sync.

features.crm: Job Management: Every intervention is structured from the start, with assigned technician, location and live status.
features.pipeline: Automatic documentation: Every completed job generates a ready report, no manual entry, no errors.

app.title: The technician records. The proof forms.
app.subtitle: TimeTracker is the mobile app that collects evidence from the field: clock-in, clock-out, photo proof, notes. All linked to the job, all sealed. Available on Android and iOS.

verifier.title: You don't need them to trust you.
verifier.subtitle: The client has the report. They verify it themselves, without accessing GeoTapp. If the data matches the real work, the seal holds. If anyone has modified the document, the seal breaks. No appeal.

features.integrity: Tamper-proof data: The report is generated from real field data and locked. Any modification makes it invalid, no appeal.
features.independent: Autonomous verification: Anyone with the report can verify its authenticity, no account, no platform access needed.

core.title: One system, three levels of certainty
core.subtitle: TimeTracker records on the field. Flow organises in the office. Verifier certifies everything matches. A closed loop, no gaps.

features.title: Real input from the field
features.desc: TimeTracker works offline and syncs automatically. Every recorded data point is authentic, with location and timestamp.

features.title: Privacy by design
features.desc: Location is recorded only at clock-in and clock-out. No continuous tracking. Fully GDPR compliant.

features.title: Real-time operational control
features.desc: Field data arrives in Flow immediately. The office has live visibility without calling anyone.

features.title: Defensible proof over time
features.desc: Every report is locked on real field data, not alterable after generation. Dispute? The data is there. Verifiable by anyone. Always.

footer_cta.title: Stop losing undocumented work.
footer_cta.subtitle: Every job without verifiable proof is a job that can be disputed. GeoTapp closes this gap.

idraulici.name: Plumbers

flow.desc: Operational management, jobs, coordination and reports.

timetracker.desc: Attendance, field activity and work proof.

flow.hero_title:
GeoTapp Flow.
Field Operations Management.
flow.hero_subtitle: The operational hub for managing clients, projects, teams and administration in one place. Flow is the platform that also powers TimeTracker.
flow.grid_subtitle: Every module is designed for real control of field work. Click to explore.
flow.cta_title: Take real control of your field.

nexus-core.name: Job Management
nexus-core.short: Create and manage technical interventions. Assign tasks to technicians, monitor progress and keep everything tracked per job.
nexus-core.full:
### Central Job Control.

Every intervention starts as a structured job.
**Job Management** gives you a clear view of all work in progress.

#### Intervention Management

Create a job, assign the technician, define the site and date.
Monitor status: Open, In Progress, Completed.

#### Operational History

Every job has a complete archive of activities, photo proofs, notes and timestamps.
The client asks what was done? You have the data. Always.

titan-flow.name: Task Assignment
titan-flow.short: Distribute work to technicians with precision. Communicate instructions, deadlines and operational priorities in a structured way.
titan-flow.full:
### The Right Job to the Right Technician.

Confused task assignment generates delays and disputes.
**Task Assignment** brings operational clarity.

#### Precise Distribution

As soon as a job is opened, assign one or more technicians.
Each technician sees their work on GeoTapp TimeTracker.

#### Operational Communication

Instructions, notes, technical attachments: everything reaches the technician before they leave for the field.
Fewer calls, fewer misunderstandings, fewer delays.

ledger-prime.name: Reports and Billing
ledger-prime.short: Generate structured reports from every job. Export documentation and support billing with real field data.
ledger-prime.full:
### From Work to Report, in an Orderly Way.

Manual billing is slow and often incomplete.
**Reports and Billing** closes the operational cycle.

#### Structured Reports

Every completed intervention generates documentation by collecting timestamps, photos and notes from the field.
No data to enter manually, it all comes from TimeTracker.

#### Billing Support

Real job data supports more accurate quotes and invoices.
Fewer errors, fewer disputes, faster administrative cycle.

quantum-logistics.name: Intervention Calendar
quantum-logistics.short: Plan interventions, visualise the operational calendar and manage team availability without overlaps.
quantum-logistics.full:
### Full View of Planned Work.

Without a shared calendar, planning becomes chaotic.
**Intervention Calendar** gives you clear operational visibility.

#### Advanced Planning

View all interventions on daily, weekly and monthly calendar views.
Identify overlaps and optimise workload distribution.

#### Team Availability

See who is available, who is on leave and who is already overloaded.
Assign new interventions without creating operational conflicts.

supply-command.name: Resource Management
supply-command.short: Control materials, equipment and operational resources needed for each field intervention. No surprises.
supply-command.full:
### No Intervention Short of Resources.

Sending a technician to the field without the right materials is a costly mistake.
**Resource Management** prevents operational surprises.

#### Materials per Job

Link required resources to each job.
The manager sees in advance what is needed and when.

#### Suppliers and Procurement

Store contact details and terms for your regular suppliers.
Reduce procurement time and keep costs under control.

the-architect.name: Work Planning
the-architect.short: Organise work into phases, tasks and deadlines. Keep the project under control without spreadsheets or WhatsApp messages.
the-architect.full:
### Structure the Work. Control the Progress.

Complex jobs require structure.
**Work Planning** brings operational order.

#### Phases and Deadlines

Structure complex interventions into operational phases with clear deadlines.
Assign responsibilities to each team member.

#### Progress Monitoring

Visualize progress in real time.
Always know what has been done and what remains open.
Act before a delay becomes a client problem.

the-auditor.name: Intervention Documentation
the-auditor.short: Collect photo evidence, operational notes and signed documents for every intervention. Work performed stays verifiable.
the-auditor.full:
### Real Proof for Every Intervention.

Without documentation, completed work is contestable.
**Intervention Documentation** makes every job verifiable.

#### Photo Evidence

Technicians take photos directly from GeoTapp TimeTracker on the field.
Images are automatically linked to the job with timestamp and location.

#### Digital Client Signature

The client can sign the work report directly on the technician's screen.
The digital signature is included in the report and constitutes proof of service delivered.

the-uplink.name: Field-to-Office Link
the-uplink.short: Data collected by TimeTracker arrives in Flow in real time. Field and office work on the same operational data.
the-uplink.full:
### Office and Field, Finally Connected.

The disconnect between field and office generates avoidable errors, delays and disputes.
**Field-to-Office Link** closes the gap.

#### Real-time Synchronisation

Every clock-in, photo and note recorded on TimeTracker arrives in Flow immediately.
The manager has a live view without having to call the technician.

#### Reliable History

Everything the technician records on the field is archived and linked to the job.
No data is lost. No information is missing when it is time to report.

the-oracle.name: Operational Visibility
the-oracle.short: Real-time operational dashboard. Always know how many interventions are open, in progress or completed today.
the-oracle.full:
### Operational Data, Not Assumptions.

Deciding without reliable data is dangerous.
**Operational Visibility** turns field data into concrete information.

#### Operational Dashboard

See in real time:
- Open and in-progress interventions
- Active technicians
- Interventions completed today and this week

#### Periodic Reports

Receive automated activity summaries.
Compare periods, identify bottlenecks and optimise operations.

app.hero_title:
GeoTapp TimeTracker.
The Field in Your Pocket.
app.hero_subtitle: The mobile app used by technicians to record activity, collect proof and maintain the operational thread directly from the field. Available on Android and iOS.
app.grid_subtitle: Every feature is designed for those who work outside the office and have no time to waste. Click to explore.
app.cta_title: Give your technicians the right tool.

timelock-alpha.name: GPS Time Tracking
timelock-alpha.short: Clock-in and clock-out linked to GPS position and precise timestamp. Every work session becomes a verifiable operational event.
timelock-alpha.full:
### Time is Verifiable.

Timestamps without verification generate disputes.
**GPS Time Tracking** makes every work session a reliable, defensible record.

#### Geolocated Clock-in and Clock-out

The technician records entry and exit from the field.
Location, address and time are registered automatically.

#### Immutable History

Every session is a verifiable record: start time, end time, position, duration and associated job.
The client asks when you arrived? The data is there, always.

event-horizon.name: Shift Planning
event-horizon.short: Manage shifts and staff availability. Weekly and monthly views for coordination without confusion or overlaps.
event-horizon.full:
### No Shift Conflicts.

Organising mobile personnel requires clarity.
**Shift Planning** gives the manager a precise, up-to-date view.

#### Calendar View

See who works when.
Identify absences, holidays and overlaps before they become operational problems.

#### Real-time Availability

Employees confirm attendance or report absences directly from the app.
The manager sees gaps in the schedule before assigning new jobs.

unit-matrix.name: Operator Registry
unit-matrix.short: Manage a complete record of your operators: roles, contacts, certifications and platform access.
unit-matrix.full:
### Know Your Team.

Every operator is a key operational resource.
**Operator Registry** centralises all vital information.

#### Certification Management

See at a glance who holds the required qualifications for a specific intervention or site.

#### Rapid Onboarding

Adding a new technician is simple.
Send an invite link: within minutes they are operational on GeoTapp TimeTracker.

sector-grid.name: Sites and Worksites
sector-grid.short: Create a database of operational sites and worksites. Link each intervention to the correct location and organise teams by zone.
sector-grid.full:
### Every Intervention in the Right Place.

Working without geographic reference generates confusion.
**Sites and Worksites** brings operational clarity.

#### Site Database

Create a catalogue of client sites, worksites and operational locations.
The system automatically links technician activity to the intervention site.

#### Zone-based Teams

Organise technicians into teams by site or geographic area.
Assign interventions to the correct team, not just the individual.

energy-logistics.name: Vehicle and Expense Management
energy-logistics.short: Track company vehicle usage, fuel consumed and travel expenses for field staff.
energy-logistics.full:
### Every Trip Documented.

Travel expenses are a critical item for any company with mobile staff.
**Vehicle Management** monitors every outgoing cost.

#### Vehicle Usage

Temporarily assign a vehicle to an employee for an intervention.
Always know who is using which vehicle and for which job.

#### Fuel Expenses

The employee records refuelling directly from the app with a receipt photo and amount.
Everything archived, everything linked to the job.

neural-link.name: Operational Communications
neural-link.short: Internal channel for company communications. Targeted messages to specific groups with read confirmations.
neural-link.full:
### Clear Communications. No Background Noise.

WhatsApp mixes private and professional life and offers no control over read status.
**Operational Communications** is the official company channel.

#### Targeted Messages

Notify only the team that needs to know.
Shift change at the Rome site? Only the assigned technicians receive the message.

#### Read Confirmations

Always know who read the communication and who did not.
Clear and transparent accountability for everyone.

payroll-bridge.name: Attendance Export
payroll-bridge.short: Export monthly attendance in formats compatible with the main payroll software. Less manual work, fewer errors.
payroll-bridge.full:
### Payroll Without Headaches.

Month end does not have to be an administrative nightmare.
**Attendance Export** connects field operations to HR administration.

#### Multi-Format

Generate attendance files ready for import into the main payroll software (Zucchetti, INAZ, TeamSystem).

#### Consultant Access

Give limited access to your payroll firm.
They download the data they need independently, without calling you every month end.

data-core.name: Weekly Reports
data-core.short: Detailed reports on hours worked per job and per operator. Reliable data for internal control and billing.
data-core.full:
### Data Does Not Lie.

Make decisions based on facts, not impressions.
**Weekly Reports** extracts value from daily operations.

#### Detailed Reports

Every week, a complete picture: who worked, where, on which job and for how long.

#### Full Transparency

Employees and managers consult the same monthly report.
Hours counted are identical for everyone.
No disputes at month end.

identity-forge.name: Branded App
identity-forge.short: Upload your logo and choose your company colours. Your operators use an app that reflects your brand identity.
identity-forge.full:
### Your Company, Your App.

Do not use a generic app.
Make your employees feel part of YOUR company with a consistent visual experience.

#### Company Logo

Your logo prominently displayed on the login screen and main dashboard.

#### Company Colours

Choose the colour theme that fits your corporate image.
Professional, consistent, recognisable.

chi_siamo.hero_desc: GeoTapp was not invented by investors or analysts. It was born from the real frustration of someone who works every day amid deadlines, job sites and demanding clients.
story: It was 2024. Mike Petraroli, our founder, was working as an employee and had an apparently trivial but incredibly costly problem: proving his own work.
At the end of the month, the hour counts never added up. Jobs done on the run between clients were forgotten. Paper got lost, WhatsApp messages got buried. It was a silent drain of time and money.

He looked for a solution. He found only complex, expensive software full of useless charts and lacking substance. Software built by people who had never clocked in or issued an invoice in an emergency from a van.
So Mike decided to build the tool he wished he'd had himself: simple, mobile, with verifiable proof. Not for investors, for companies like his.

values.title: Clear Mission
values.desc: Make every job measurable and verifiable. Field work deserves the same transparency tools as an office.

values.title: Dedicated Team
values.desc: We are a small team obsessed with the problem we solve. Every feature comes from real feedback, not marketing roadmaps.

values.title: Privacy by Design
values.desc: We do not sell data, we do not track continuously. GPS only at the moment of clock-in, zero surveillance.

values.title: Made in Italy
values.desc: Developed in Italy for the Italian and European market. GDPR rules, work culture and local regulations are in the product's DNA.

chi_siamo.cta_desc: We're not an unreachable Big Tech company. We're real people building software for real people.
chi_siamo.mission_quote: Field work deserves the same transparency tools as an office.

founder.name: Michele Angelo Petraroli
founder.bio: Michele Angelo Petraroli is the founder and CEO of GeoTapp, an Italian SaaS company building field workforce management software for European SMEs. Coming from an operational background where he saw firsthand how cleaning crews, installers and security teams lose money to missing proofs of work, he founded GeoTapp in 2024 to solve it at the source. Today GeoTapp helps European SMEs with GDPR-compliant GPS tracking, photographic evidence and digital signatures that make every field job verifiable.

roi.intro: This calculator estimates how much your business can save each year by automating attendance, field reports and proof of work. Enter a few figures and get your annual saving, payback time and ROI in 30 seconds, with no sign-up.
roi.faq_title: Frequently asked questions about the ROI calculation
roi.pricing_link: See how much you can save with the ROI calculator

faq.q: How is the ROI of a GPS time-tracking app calculated?
faq.a: The estimate is built from three concrete items: the admin hours saved every month, the disputes and unwarranted overtime avoided thanks to geolocated proof, and the coordination time recovered. The yearly total is compared with the subscription cost to produce ROI and payback time.

faq.q: Do I need to register or leave an email to see the result?
faq.a: No. The calculation is instant and free: enter your figures and see the estimate straight away. Email is optional and only used if you want the detailed breakdown and practical guides.

faq.q: What data is the estimated saving based on?
faq.a: Only the values you enter: number of operators, sites or job sites managed, hours spent on admin, hourly cost and the disputes typical of your sector. The more realistic your inputs, the closer the estimate is to your situation.

settore_layout.pain_subtitle: Clock-in apps record. They don't certify. There's an enormous difference, and you feel it the moment a dispute arises.
settore_layout.roi_title: How much would you save with GeoTapp?
settore_layout.roi_desc: Enter your team size and get an estimated ROI in 30 seconds. No registration, no email.
settore_layout.cta_note: No lock-in. No contract. We set up on your real case.

features.title: Power Under the Hood.
features.subtitle: We don't build toys. GeoTapp is an enterprise platform built to scale. Here are the technologies that make the magic happen.
features.gps_desc: Know where your team is, in real time. Our live map shows every clock-in with GPS coordinates, geofencing validation and anti-spoofing protection. Managers see who is on-site at a glance, no calls, no guesswork.
features.offline_desc: Connection drops, work doesn't. We built a locally-synced database (CRDT) that lives inside the app. Your technicians can work in an underground bunker; as soon as they see a sliver of sky, data will silently sync with the cloud.
features.encryption_desc: Sleep soundly. We use AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Even if an attacker intercepted your data, they would see nothing but white noise. Privacy isn't just a legal checkbox, it's mathematics.
features.realtime_desc: No more hitting F5. Thanks to WebSockets, information travels instantly. When a technician closes a ticket in Rome, the manager in Milan sees the dot turn green in the same millisecond. It's like being everywhere at once.
features.cms_desc: Content is fluid. Our headless architecture decouples data from presentation. This means you can publish a blog post, push it to the mobile app, and send it via newsletter with a single click.
features.datalake_desc: From 100 to 100 million records without breaking a sweat. We use partitioned PostgreSQL to handle massive data volumes without slowdowns. Your history is precious, we keep it forever, accessible in an instant.
features.cdn_desc: Speed is geographic. Our static assets are replicated across 300+ data centres worldwide. Whether your client is in New York or Tokyo, your site loads as if the server were in the next room.

risorseGps.metaTitleSelettore: GPS and worker monitoring in Europe: what you need to stay compliant, country by country
risorseGps.metaDescSelettore: Choose a country and find out what it takes to make GPS and worker monitoring compliant: obligations, procedure, authority and a template to download.
risorseGps.h1Selettore: GPS and worker monitoring, country by country
risorseGps.introSelettore: Same Europe, different rules. You send a crew to install, clean or guard in another country and assume the rules on GPS and worker monitoring are the ones from home. They are not. Every state has its own, and they apply where the work happens: a company with a site abroad follows the local rules, even if the crew is only there on a posting. Choose the destination and we tell you what it takes to be compliant: the obligations, the procedure, who to contact and the template to download.
risorseGps.inArrivoNota: We are preparing the page for this country.
risorseGps.metaTitleScheda: GPS and worker monitoring in {paese}: what you need to stay compliant
risorseGps.metaDescScheda: What it takes to make GPS and worker monitoring compliant in {paese}: obligations, procedure, competent authority, penalties and a template to download.
risorseGps.cosaServeLegenda: For each obligation we tell you whether it applies in this country: Yes means required, It depends means only in certain cases, No means not required.
risorseGps.disclaimer: This is an informational resource, not legal advice. Before activating a monitoring system, have your situation checked by a professional.
risorseGps.ctaTitolo: Want a system that is already compliant?
risorseGps.ctaTesto: GeoTapp records the location only at clock-in, not continuously, and generates the notice for workers to sign. Try it for free.

items.q: Can I use GPS to keep an eye on my crew while they work?
items.a: GPS at work is legal almost everywhere in Europe, on one condition: it has to organise and prove the work, not watch the person. The how is what counts. Recording location at clock-in, when someone opens and closes a job, is a very different thing from following them in real time all day. The first is usually fine when the paperwork is in order; the second almost never is.

items.q: Do my own country's rules apply, or the country where I send the team?
items.a: The country where the work happens. If your company is based in Ireland but the job site is in France, you follow the French rules, even if the crew is there for a two-week stint. That's why this page asks you to pick the destination first: the obligations shift from one state to the next, and what's enough at home can fall short across the border.

items.q: Do I need the worker's consent?
items.a: Consent is rarely the right route, which catches a lot of people out. In an employment relationship consent is treated as not freely given, because the person who refuses fears the fallout, so regulators prefer other grounds: the company's legitimate interest or a contractual duty, paired with a clear privacy notice. In several countries you also need a step with the union or a workplace agreement before you switch anything on.

items.q: Can I track location in real time, all day long?
items.a: That's the exact thing that triggers the fines. Continuous tracking is considered disproportionate almost everywhere: you record far more than you need to pay the hours or prove a job. The practical rule is to collect the minimum, the location at the moment that matters, not a thread that trails the person from morning to night.

items.q: What's the risk if I switch a system on without being compliant?
items.a: It depends on the country, but GDPR fines climb to numbers no small business wants to see, and in some states there are labour-law consequences on top. The real problem, though, often isn't the fine: it's that data collected the wrong way becomes useless exactly when you need it, in a dispute or in front of a client who's contesting the bill. Each country sheet shows the real maximum penalty and the cases on record.

items.q: Is GeoTapp a surveillance system?
items.a: No, and it was built specifically not to be. The tool records location only at clock-in, when someone opens or closes a job, never continuously, and it produces the privacy notice for them to sign. It's there to prove what was done and where, not to watch people. That's the difference between proof of work and a leash.

sanzioniGps.metaTitle: GPS penalty calculator: how much you risk monitoring workers, country by country
sanzioniGps.metaDesc: Pick a country and see the real maximum fine for GPS worker monitoring and which obligations expose you. Verified data, 39 European countries.
sanzioniGps.h1: How much do you risk tracking your workers?
sanzioniGps.intro: Pick a country, see the highest fine actually issued and tick what you already have in place: we tell you how exposed you are. Source-verified data, 39 countries.
sanzioniGps.adempimentiTitolo: What you need in place (tick what you already have)
sanzioniGps.espostoUno: You're missing {n} required obligation out of {tot}: you're exposed up to
sanzioniGps.espostoMulti: You're missing {n} required obligations out of {tot}: you're exposed up to
sanzioniGps.inRegola: No required obligation missing: you're on the right track.

items.q: What's the real risk if GPS isn't compliant?
items.a: It depends on the country and on what went wrong, but GDPR fines aren't symbolic: they reach a percentage of turnover that can floor a small business, and in several states there are labour-law consequences on top. Pick the destination above and you'll see the real maximum figure, with the case it's drawn from.

items.q: Do GDPR fines really hit small businesses?
items.a: Yes, and the idea that regulators only go after the big players is one of the beliefs that costs the most. The cases listed on each country sheet include outfits of a handful of people, fined precisely for monitoring staff without the paperwork in order. Size affects the amount, not whether you're in the firing line.

items.q: Is the fine the only risk?
items.a: No, and it's often not even the worst one. Data collected the wrong way becomes useless exactly when you need it, in a dispute with an employee or in front of a client contesting an invoice. You end up with the fine to pay and without the proof you thought you had.

items.q: Can I be fined even if the workers agreed?
items.a: Yes, because in an employment relationship consent counts for little: the person who gives it is assumed not to be truly free to refuse. Regulators look at whether the processing was proportionate and whether you had solid grounds and a clear privacy notice, not at whether someone signed a sheet. The workers' agreement on its own doesn't protect you.

items.q: Where do these figures come from?
items.a: From real decisions by data protection authorities and from national law, not from estimates. Each sheet gives the source and the case, so you can trace it back to the document. This is an informative resource, not legal advice: before switching a system on, have your situation checked by a professional.

items.q: How do I lower the risk of a fine?
items.a: By collecting the bare minimum you actually need: location at clock-in, not continuous tracking, with a signed privacy notice and a basis other than consent. That's exactly how GeoTapp was built, and the privacy-notice generator here in the resources prepares the document for them to sign.

indiceSorveglianza.metaTitle: Worker surveillance index in Europe: the 39-country ranking
indiceSorveglianza.metaDesc: Which European countries have the strictest rules on worker monitoring? Ranking by severity index, with maximum fine and source. 39 countries.
indiceSorveglianza.intro: Europe doesn't treat worker surveillance the same way everywhere. We ranked 39 countries by how strict the framework is: more required obligations, higher the index. Click the columns to re-sort.
indiceSorveglianza.metodologia: The index (0-100) measures how many worker-monitoring obligations are mandatory in that country: score = required obligations + half of the conditional ones, over the total. Higher = stricter framework for anyone wanting to track. Data derived from the source-verified country pages; it ranks compliance burden, not 'freedom'.

items.q: What does the workplace surveillance index measure?
items.a: How strict each country's framework is on monitoring workers: the number of mandatory obligations, the steps required before switching a system on, and the weight of the penalties. The higher the score, the more you have to put in order before using GPS or any staff monitoring in that country.

items.q: Does a high score mean GPS is banned there?
items.a: No, it means more care is needed, not that it's forbidden. Almost everywhere in Europe GPS at work is allowed, as long as it's used to organise and prove the work and not to watch the person. A high index just tells you the obligations are heavier and that improvising gets expensive.

items.q: Where does the ranking data come from?
items.a: From the 39 country dossiers on the site, built on national law and real decisions by the authorities. The ranking distils them into a comparable score; click a country and you reach the sheet with the obligations, the competent authority and the sources.

items.q: Why do neighbouring countries score so differently?
items.a: Because GDPR sets the frame but each state adds its own rules on top, and on monitoring workers the differences are sharp: where a union agreement is needed, where a privacy notice is enough, where the authority is more aggressive. That's why taking your home rules for granted across the border is the mistake that triggers the fines.

items.q: How often is it updated?
items.a: The sheets carry the verification date and are reviewed when the law changes or new decisions come out. This is an informative resource, not legal advice: before switching a system on, have your situation checked by a professional.

items.q: How do I use the ranking if I send teams abroad?
items.a: Start from the country where they'll be working, not yours: the rules there are the ones that apply. Look at the score to gauge how much work is ahead, then open the sheet for the exact obligations and prepare the privacy notice to be signed before the trip.
